items.title: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
items.dek: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.
items.body: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.

items.title: What we know so far about the search for missing US airman in Iran
items.dek: US and Iranian forces are searching for a missing American crew member after a US warplane was shot down.
items.body: US and Iranian forces are searching for a missing American crew member after a US warplane was shot down.
